title: I am safe to be seen as wealthy
subtitle: A release-and-allow method for letting visibility and success coexist safely.
excerpt: A short energy statement practice from Day 18 of the MONEY program. Use when the prospect of being seen with money brings a pull to hide, downplay, or make yourself smaller.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 18 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you've received good news about money but immediately felt a pull to keep it quiet, or when the idea of being visibly wealthy feels unsafe.

content.text: A three-minute energy statement practice from Day 18 of the MONEY program. The statement targets the pattern of making yourself invisible around money: hiding purchases, softening wins, staying quiet when things go well financially.
I am ready to release all fear of being seen, judged, or changed by money. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow full safety in being seen as wealthy. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from Day 18 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow framework draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
